leads.notes: Building AI infrastructure for fintech. Mentioned pain with outbound on X. Team of 14, hiring 3 SDRs -- perfect timing for our pitch.

interactions.note: Identified via funding announcement scrape. Strong ICP match: AI company, recently funded, growing sales team.
Sent personalized DM referencing their recent Series A and hiring posts. Mentioned our Meridian Labs results.
Marcus replied: 'Interesting timing. We're literally building out our outbound motion right now. Tell me more.'
Sent detailed overview with case study. Proposed 30-min intro call.
Intro call scheduled for March 6th.

leads.notes: Developer tools for ML ops. Very active on X with strong following. Currently doing outbound manually with 1 SDR. Clear pain point around scaling outreach.

interactions.note: Found through X engagement with AI sales content. Lena liked 3 of our threads.
Warm DM referencing her engagement with our content and their hiring post for SDR #2.
Quick reply: 'Been following your builds. Would love to chat about what you did for Meridian.'
30-min intro call. Strong interest. Asked for proposal with pricing options.
Sent proposal: $5K/month retainer + $2K setup. Awaiting decision.
Gentle follow-up. Lena said she's reviewing with co-founder this week.

leads.notes: Biotech data platform. Large enterprise sales team but struggling with top-of-funnel. Came through as high-score lead from research agent. $180K ACV potential.

interactions.note: Surfaced by research agent. Series B in Jan 2026, 85-person company, actively hiring in sales. High ICP score: 88/100.
Sent outreach DM referencing their recent expansion and challenges scaling pipeline for enterprise biotech.

leads.notes: Cloud cost optimization platform. Solo founder with small team. Very engaged on X -- 12K followers. Needs outbound but has zero sales team.

interactions.note: Found via X monitoring: tweeted about needing to start outbound but not wanting to hire SDRs. Perfect signal.
DM'd referencing her exact tweet about outbound challenges. Offered a no-commitment pilot.
Amara replied: 'This is exactly what I need. No bandwidth to build a sales team right now. What does a pilot look like?'
Sent pilot structure overview. Awaiting scheduling of intro call.

leads.notes: Cybersecurity startup for SMBs. Big sales org (20+ people) but heavy focus on inbound. Might need help expanding outbound channels.

interactions.note: Identified from funding database scan. Large sales team, mostly inbound-driven. Outbound opportunity may be limited -- needs further qualification.

leads.notes: AI-powered lab automation. Pilot client converted to $5K/month retainer. Expanding scope to LinkedIn. Reference client for case studies.

interactions.note: Inbound inquiry from Sarah after seeing our X thread on AI sales agents.
Intro call. Strong fit. Agreed to 6-week pilot at $3K/month.
Pilot started. Agent provisioned, ICP configured.
Pilot review. 12 meetings booked, $340K pipeline. Sarah thrilled.
Signed $5K/month retainer. Expanding to include LinkedIn outreach channel.

leads.notes: Data analytics for e-commerce. Interested but too early stage -- no budget for external sales support. Revisit in 6 months after they raise.

interactions.note: Outreach based on hiring post for first sales hire.
Jordan responded positively but flagged budget constraints.
Quick call confirmed: interested but pre-revenue, cant justify $3K+/month yet.
Marked as closed-lost. Set reminder to revisit post-Series A. Added to nurture content list.

leads.notes: Industrial robotics company. Strong funding, growing commercial team. Research agent enriched profile -- high ICP score (82). Ready for outreach sequence.

interactions.note: Auto-surfaced by research agent from funding announcement. 82/100 ICP score. 42 employees, hiring in sales and marketing. Nina is active on X with 5K followers.
